title: Stage 09 Retrospective Gate
description: Stage 9 (Retrospective) gate. Informational — status is always PASS unless the synthesis itself failed. Authored by the principal agent after parallel agent contributions land in pipeline/retrospective.md.

severity.description: Run severity per the rubric in .devteam/rules/retrospective.md: green=clean, yellow=retries or post-build BLOCKERs, red=user-visible defect or unresolved halt.

lessons_promoted.description: Lesson titles added to pipeline/lessons-learned.md this run. Capped at 2 per retro.

patterns_harvested.description: Count of PATTERN: entries the principal pulled from Stage 5 review files before promotion selection.

contributions_written.description: Agents that wrote a Stage 9a contribution section (always pm + principal + 4 devs; security-engineer also when 4.5b fired).
